rounds: The 6am necklace purchase — no deliberating, just did it — that one's yours. Toes painted on a Saturday, standing in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — also yours. The joy police showed up this week but they didn't stop any of that. Sleep tried to take you out mid-week though — four hours, five hours, three hours lying awake — that round goes to the noise.
pattern: They're loudest in the lead-up, quietest once you've already done the thing.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
